channel.title: Documentation on Darklane Theme Demo
channel.description: Recent content in Documentation on Darklane Theme Demo

item.title: Layout/Cell/MD Shortcodes
item.description: Darklane’s layout shortcodes give you multi-column control in Hugo—just wrap your content in simple tags.

item.title: Gallery Shortcode
item.description: The gallery shortcode makes it easy to show multiple images as a slideshow without cluttering your post. Navigate with arrow buttons or keyboard.

item.title: Shortcode Examples
item.description: Darklane includes several custom shortcodes to enhance your content beyond standard Markdown. This post demonstrates many of them.

item.title: Markdown Guide
item.description: This post demonstrates the standard Markdown formatting features supported by Darklane.
